/usr/sbin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/hoop_timer/min_heap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/http/http_conn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/list_timer/lst_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/log/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/sql/sql_connection_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/time_wheel/time_wheel_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/tool/tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/include/webserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TinyWebServer.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/TinyWebServer  /usr/lib/libmysqlclient.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread
